title: Minimalist Home Office Setup with Laptop and Indoor Plants
description: A minimalist home office corner featuring a wooden desk with a laptop, wireless keyboard and mouse, a coffee mug, and indoor plants. The ergonomic grey office chair with a beige cushion is positioned next to the desk. Soft natural light filters through sheer curtains, illuminating the neutral-toned room with a calming and clean aesthetic. A small shelf with books and decorative items hangs on the wall above the desk.
